name: Jumping Jacks
description: Stand with feet together, arms at sides. Jump while spreading legs and raising arms overhead. Return to start.

name: Wall Sit
description: Lean against a wall with knees bent at 90 degrees, as if sitting in an invisible chair. Hold the position.

name: Push-Ups
description: Start in plank position, hands shoulder-width apart. Lower chest to floor, then push back up.

name: Abdominal Crunches
description: Lie on your back, knees bent. Curl your shoulders toward your knees, engaging your abs. Lower back down.

name: Step-Ups
description: Step onto a sturdy chair or bench with one foot, drive up to standing, then step back down. Alternate legs.

name: Squats
description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your hips back and down as if sitting. Return to standing.

name: Tricep Dips
description: Place hands on a chair behind you, fingers forward. Lower your body by bending elbows, then push back up.

name: Plank
description: Hold a push-up position with arms straight (or on forearms). Keep body in a straight line from head to heels.

name: High Knees
description: Run in place, driving knees up toward chest as high as possible. Pump arms for momentum.

name: Lunges
description: Step forward with one leg, lowering until both knees are at 90 degrees. Push back to start. Alternate legs.

name: Push-Up with Rotation
description: Do a push-up, then rotate to one side, extending that arm to the ceiling. Return and repeat on the other side.

name: Side Plank
description: Lie on one side, prop yourself up on your forearm. Keep body in a straight line. Hold, then switch sides.

name: Cat-Cow Flow
description: On hands and knees, alternate between arching your spine up (cat) and dropping your belly while lifting your chest (cow).

name: Downward Dog
description: From hands-and-feet, lift hips high creating an inverted V. Press through palms and lengthen hamstrings.

name: Warrior II
description: Step feet wide, bend the front knee, extend arms long at shoulder height, and gaze over the front hand.

name: Child's Pose
description: Kneel, sit hips back toward heels, and stretch arms forward while resting the forehead on the mat.

name: Seated Forward Fold
description: Sit tall with legs extended, hinge at the hips, and fold forward reaching toward feet while keeping spine long.
